items.title: Raptors’ Chucky Hepburn Signs Two-Way Qualifying Offer
items.author: Hoops Rumors
items.body_excerpt: Raptors’ Chucky Hepburn Signs Two-Way Qualifying Offer Hoops Rumors

items.title: The Toronto Raptors have tendered two-way qualifying offers to Chucky Hepburn and Alijah Martin, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Toronto Raptors have tendered two-way qualifying offers to Chucky Hepburn and Alijah Martin, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Both Hepburn and Martin will now be restricted free agents this summer. @mikeascotto.bsky.social reported Hepburn intends to sign his QO to return to Toronto.

items.title: Raptors' Chucky Hepburn: Back with Raptors on two-way deal

items.title: Toronto Raptors guard Chucky Hepburn will sign his two-way qualifying offer and return to the team next season, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. He averaged 12.4 points and shot 36.8% from 3-point range with 8.6 assists and 2.4 steals for game with the Raptors
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Toronto Raptors guard Chucky Hepburn will sign his two-way qualifying offer and return to the team next season, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. He averaged 12.4 points and shot 36.8% from 3-point range with 8.6 assists and 2.4 steals for game with the Raptors 905 in the G League.
